title: Global Markets Brief — 07 Jul 2026
intro: Risk-on sentiment prevails in US equities despite Asian weakness, driven by technology sector strength and stabilizing dollar momentum ahead of mid-week central bank commentary.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-on sentiment prevails in US equities despite Asian weakness, driven by technology sector strength and stabilizing dollar momentum ahead of mid-week central bank commentary.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
CHF +0.21% — Safe-haven bid amid elevated USD/JPY intervention concerns
CAD +0.05% — Energy complex strength supporting commodity currency
JPY -0.03% — Holding defensive near 162 with intervention risk elevated
GBP -0.08% — Modest retreat after recent rally, consolidation phase
EUR -0.14% — Profit-taking after strong H1 gains, eyeing ECB signals
AUD -0.16% — China growth concerns weighing on risk-sensitive commodity FX
NZD -0.16% — Underperforming alongside broader antipodean weakness

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1431 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: 1.1400 support, fade rallies into 1.1480
USDJPY 162.0250 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: MOF intervention risk intensifies above 162.50
AUDUSD 0.6947 | Bias: CAUTIOUS | Watch: 0.6920 support, China data dependency

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
S&P 500 5751.28 +0.87% — Tech-led rally extends gains into Asian hours
Nasdaq 26121 +1.12% — Outperformance continues on AI and semiconductor strength
Nikkei 225 68257 -2.12% — Sharp selloff on yen intervention fears and profit-taking
DAX 25818 flat — Consolidating ahead of European open, awaiting fresh catalysts

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold $4142.00 -0.61% — Pullback from record highs as dollar steadies and real yields tick higher
WTI Crude $69.42 +1.27% — Supply concerns and geopolitical premium supporting energy complex
Silver $61.56 -1.24% — Industrial demand worries outweigh precious metal support

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin $63282 -1.12% — Consolidation continues below $64K resistance, ETF flows remain mixed
Ethereum $1778.30 -1.08% — Tracking BTC lower, awaiting network upgrade catalyst for breakout

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: USDJPY 161.80-162.00 | Fade intervention fear into 163.50 targeting momentum continuation
LONG: WTI Crude 68.80-69.20 | Supply tightness supports dips, target 71.50
SHORT: Gold 4155-4165 | Overbought conditions, target 4095 on profit-taking
SHORT: EURUSD 1.1465-1.1485 | Resistance zone holds, target 1.1380 on dollar stabilization
